acceptance_targets: [CH02-BKR-001] Pass if every communication beat in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:129-153 produces a distinct change in Eli's options or risk, and no two consecutive beats end with simple non-response without a new consequence; fail otherwise.

[CH02-CRF-001] Pass if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:297-305 contains at least one explicit concealed financial fact and one immediate interpersonal consequence inside the same exchange; fail if the moment remains primarily metaphor/evasion.

[CH02-DLG-001] Pass if each revised voicemail includes spoken-pressure texture (e.g., restart, interruption, clipped correction) and the second voicemail is recognizably sharper than the first in diction and threat level; fail if both still read like parallel policy memos.

[CH02-PRS-001] Pass if within the revised target spans the exact stem 'He told himself' appears no more than once and at least two denial beats are conveyed through different prose constructions; fail if the repeated scaffold remains dominant.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if every communication beat in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:129-153 produces a distinct change in Eli's options or risk, and no two consecutive beats end with simple non-response without a new consequence; fail otherwise.
findings.problem: The mid-chapter communication run repeats the same non-decision beat (call, dodge, silence) before the burner-phone pivot, so escalation stalls instead of compounding at each contact.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten and re-sequence the contact stretch in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:129-153 so each beat forces a new constraint (e.g., a concrete deadline loss, an HR status change, or a family consequence) rather than another ignored exchange. Preserve the burner pivot but remove at least one redundant dodge loop in this span.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:297-305 contains at least one explicit concealed financial fact and one immediate interpersonal consequence inside the same exchange; fail if the moment remains primarily metaphor/evasion.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the chapter's hardest accountability point: Nora asks for exact financial facts, but the prose retreats to metaphor and evasive phrasing, muting the concrete economic harm and blunting immediate consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:297-305, replace abstraction with specific financial reality (what transfer data he is hiding: amount/date/account movement) and render immediate embodied pressure plus relational damage in-scene. Do not resolve morally; make the concealment legible and costly in concrete terms.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if each revised voicemail includes spoken-pressure texture (e.g., restart, interruption, clipped correction) and the second voicemail is recognizably sharper than the first in diction and threat level; fail if both still read like parallel policy memos.
findings.problem: Cal's two voicemails share an over-polished memo cadence, so his spoken voice reads as procedural transcription rather than pressured live speech with evolving stakes.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise Cal's voicemail lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:77-81 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:153 into more oral rhythm: shorter bursts, at least one self-correction/disfluency, and clearer escalation between first and second message while retaining compliance content.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if within the revised target spans the exact stem 'He told himself' appears no more than once and at least two denial beats are conveyed through different prose constructions; fail if the repeated scaffold remains dominant.
findings.problem: A recurring self-justification construction (notably repeated 'He told himself' scaffolding) appears more than twice and starts to feel mechanically reused, flattening cadence and over-literalizing Eli's stress tell.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated denial beats in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:49, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:133, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:357-361 so the same psychology is delivered through varied sentence shapes (action contradiction, sensory counterpoint, and one terse interior line) rather than repeated stem phrasing.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
